km.Wales, United Kingdom: វេលស៍, uណៃteត គីnហ្គដុម

zh.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan是Leuan ap Rhyrid的兒子，於1230年出生在英國威爾斯。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan是Leuan ap Rhyrid的儿子，于1230年出生在英国威尔斯。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Leuan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish: status name for a feudal tenant or vassal, Dutch leenman. This surname is found in Belgium and France (mainly Nord). Compare Dutch Leeman 1.

variants.name: Leaman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name or nickname Lefman (see Lemon ).
History: This (see 2 above) is one of the variants of the name of a Swiss Mennonite family, in the US most commonly spelled   Lehman  .

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Gruffud
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

en.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan was born in 1230, in Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Leuan ap Rhyrid. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan est né en 1230, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Leuan ap Rhyrid. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan wurde 1230 in Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Leuan ap Rhyrid geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan è nato il nel 1230 nel Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Leuan ap Rhyrid. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuanは1230年にイギリスウェールズでLeuan ap Rhyridの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan(은)는 1230년 영국 웨일스에서 Leuan ap Rhyrid의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan nasceu em 1230, em Gales, United Kingdom filho de Leuan ap Rhyrid. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan родился в 1230 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. Его отца звали Leuan ap Rhyrid. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Leuan nació en 1230, en Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Leuan ap Rhyrid. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.
